requirements.requirement: Conduct risk-tiered assessments for all third-party technology service providers
requirements.rationale: Ensures due diligence proportionate to vendor criticality

requirements.requirement: Establish outsourcing governance with board oversight for material technology outsourcing
requirements.rationale: Meets SC expectations for governance of outsourced technology functions

requirements.requirement: Monitor vendor performance against SLAs with escalation for persistent underperformance
requirements.rationale: Ensures outsourced service quality meets operational requirements

requirements.requirement: Identify and manage risks from fourth-party sub-contracting in critical service chains
requirements.rationale: Provides visibility into supply chain dependencies impacting market operations
